== Notes for [[Item:Q3012|Q3012]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-47161-AGS2/type/fa/id/ES-AGS-47161-UD-117090/unitid/ES-AGS-47161-UD-117090+-+ES-AGS-47161-UD-1645899/search/0/de+Lerma

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA96BE31EFBBFA9822EF79916CA859
geni:6000000077314509043
